meta.title: Mean Temperature each Day in May— Central England
meta.subtitle: 3 days in May in Central England in over 250 years have been over 21°C
meta.summary: Each dot is one day in May across the full HadCET daily-mean series (Central England). The trend line summarizes the century-scale pattern. Only a handful of May days exceed a 21 °C daily mean — explore hover and click below.
